title: Persist
description: A slow burn passion project of multiple years.
body:
Just a personal project. No real unifying aesthethic besides references to my personal style like my pets and family, my wayuu heritage, and my spooky inclinations.

I used to work on this prolifically but nowadays it's a lot slower paced so don't expect lots of updates. That said, I'm mostly working on tweaks, improvements and most of the mobs, tho all the common ones are mostly done.

I have a passion for this project so I hope that comes across and you can enjoy using this as much as I enjoyed making it.

This pack includes

 - The majority of blocks 
 - and items
 - Lots of mobs but this is most of whats missing
 - Fully featured GUIs

And a good handful of custom models for
   - Function/Job Blocks
   - Doors, including trapdoors
   - Iron bars
   - Crops including potato, beets, melon and pumpkin 
   - Some plants like mushrooms and lilypads

This pack includes changes like

   - Wheat and bread to maize and arepas
   - Likewise, cake to cachapa, a sweet corn cake
   - Tamed black wolves are Australian shepherd-Border Collie mixes like my pet dog, Sasso and chestnut wolves are my briard girl, Sancocho.
   - Various small tweaks like fire charges being eldritch flaming eye-mouths, fermented spider eyes being colonized by mycelium instead, and various small changes in the names of items

By downloading Persist you may:

 - Use it in game. 
 - Hopefully have a nice time.
 - Showcase videos and pictures of its use in-game for review purposes elsewhere on the internet.
